title: The Reason for Granting Safe-Conduct to al-Harith b. Surayj
description: al-Hurith b. Surayjil53 It is reported that when the disagreement between Nagr and alKirmani occurred in Khurasin, Nagr was afraid that al-Harith b. Surayj would muster his followers and the Turks against him, and that the situation would be worse for him than it had been with al-Kirmani and others. Na$r therefore was keen' 154 to consult alHarith. So he sent Mugatil b. Hayyan al-Nabati, Tha'labah b. $afwin al-Banani, Anas b. Bajalah al-'Araji, Hudbah al-Sha'rawi, and Rabi'ah al-Qurashi to al-Harith to bring him back from the country of the Turks.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
